description.ko: 데이터가 풍부한 환경 속에서 광섬유 잎맥과 픽셀화된 꽃가루를 특징으로 하는, 생물학과 회로가 만나는 디지털 난초입니다.
description.en: A digital orchid where biology meets circuitry, featuring fiber-optic veins and pixelated pollen in a data-rich environment.

prompt: A hyper-realistic cinematic 3D render of FLORA-9, titled 'The Photosynthetic Network.' A futuristic botanical entity featuring translucent #FFB6C1 pale pink petals woven with #50C878 emerald micro-circuitry and #89CFF0 cyan fiber-optic veins. The plant is rooted in a bed of #4A0E4E deep plum data-soil composed of crushed silicon shards. Shimmering digital pollen floats in the air like glowing pixels in an ethereal atmosphere. Macro photography focus, Unreal Engine 5 style, bioluminescent glow, 8k resolution, merging organic life with technological hardware.
